transcript.text:
[City of Daegu, the holy ground of makchang (A Korean dish of abomasum of either beef or pork)]
[Among all the makchang restaurants,]
[A shrine for all makchang lovers]
It's so packed
Daegu's top 3 makchang places = the country's top 3 makchang places
[Her reaction is on fleek]
This place is truly the best makchang restaurant I've ever been
Hello everyone
I am here in Daegu today
As you know, Daegu is well known for makchang (A Korean dish of beef/pork abomasum aka "last viscus")
Among all those great makchang places,
The restaurant, called "Gugongtan makchang, is considered as one of the top 3 here
As you can see, the place is so packed
I'll hurry up and go inside since I don't have much time left
[Gugongtan Makchang, one of the top 3 makchang restaurants in the city of Daegu]
It's so crowded in here

[Must comply with COVID-19 safety guidelines]
Let's take a look at the menu
How many servings of makchang should I order?
10 servings of pork makchang please
And also 1 order of doenjang-jjigae (Korean soybean paste stew)
How many grams of makchang is it per serving? About 140g I think I can eat about 15 servings
I think I can eat about 15 servings then
(Worried) You can order more after you finish 10 servings first, so I will bring 10 for now
[While it's getting pre-grilled,]
[They give you some jjondeugi (Chews) as an appetizer]
It's been so long since I had it
[She's out of her mind thinking about makchang]
Oh no, it's burning. It's already burned!
I should eat it right away
It's hot
but tasty tho

It's crispy
[Exhausted from waiting]
[Urgent treatment]
The doenjang jjigae tastes amazing
How is it so delicious without any meat inside?
Imagine you order nothing else but this $2 soup and a bowl of rice just to enjoy the jjigae
Haha, what a jerk thing to do
[Here comes makchang]
[One more plate]
[All 10 servings of makchang came out]
Can I eat it right away? Yes, you may
Look, it's so thick
[Amazed]
[Amazed again]
[3 times in a row]
Dude, this is fantastic

It's the definition of "Crispy on the outside but juicy inside"
Makchang normally has a unique gamy taste, but I can barely smell it from this one
I can't believe it doesn't smell
The first bite literally made me say "This tastes amazing"
It's even tastier if the outside is extra crispy
I should grill it more
To make it more crispy
This is absolutely fabulous, no joke
It's incredible, seriously
I love how it's pre-grilled already
because the hardest part is drooling while cooking the meat
I love that I can eat it right away
It's almost fully cooked already
It's so yummy
No wonder this place is one of the top 3
Please try a piece, producer

It's so good right?
PD: Forget about filming today
Even my producer agreed! It's really good
This is the best makchang I've ever tried
Among all the makchang places that I've been to, this place serves the most delicious makchang with the least odor
My no. 1 favorite makchang place
It should be grilled to the point where the outside gets pretty hard like this
Actually, not too hard tho
Moderately hard
Yummy
I love this moment. So happy
Let's put them all over
I don't think I can put it in my mouth
[Say sorry to your mouth]
It's being crisply cooked!
Oh my little babies

Y'all look very tasty
I'm going crazy now
I have nothing to say other than it's tasty
I mean, I do like makchang in general, but this is different
Its skin is thin and crispy at the same time
The texture is amazing
It even makes her eat veggies
The ones I just cooked taste even better
Unbelievable! I'm sorry?
Are you eating all of this? Yes
Don't you get full?
I'm okay [Are you human?]
Oh my Lord
Put more, more, faster, everything!
Wow that piece was super tasty
So yummy

[Making a skewer]
Look, it's makchang skewer!
[You have to manually spin the skewer]
Their stew is good too
It was the best when it was fresh off the grill
Was there anything else I said?
Gopchang
Is that it?
[Gotta go anyway]
